title: Vant-Lynx Demo Coverage
description: Ensure each component's demo page covers all demos shown on Vant's official documentation. Compare with https://vant-ui.github.io/vant/ and add missing demo sections.

context.demoStructure: Use DemoPage wrapper, sections with <text> headers, demo components below
context.reference: Look at button.vue for good example of section structure

userStories.title: Popup demo coverage
userStories.description: Add all Vant Popup demos: Basic, Position, Close Icon, Round Corner, etc.
requirements: Check Vant docs for Popup demos
Add missing demos to pages/popup.vue
Include: Basic Usage, Position (top/bottom/left/right/center), Close Icon, Round Corner, Listen Events

userStories.title: Dialog demo coverage
userStories.description: Add all Vant Dialog demos: Alert, Confirm, Async Close, Custom Content, etc.
requirements: Check Vant docs for Dialog demos
Include: Alert Dialog, Confirm Dialog, Round Button Style, Async Close, Custom Content, Before Close

userStories.title: Toast demo coverage
userStories.description: Add all Vant Toast demos: Text, Loading, Success, Fail, Custom Icon, Position, etc.
requirements: Include: Text Toast, Loading Toast, Success/Fail Toast, Custom Icon, Custom Position, Word Break

userStories.title: Notify demo coverage
userStories.description: Add all Vant Notify demos: Basic, Type, Custom, Duration, etc.
requirements: Include: Basic Usage, Notify Type (primary/success/warning/danger), Custom Notify, Custom Duration

userStories.title: Picker demo coverage
userStories.description: Add all Vant Picker demos: Basic, Default Value, Multiple Columns, Cascade, etc.
requirements: Include: Basic Usage, Default Index, Multiple Columns, Cascade Selection, Disable Option, Loading State, With Popup

userStories.title: DatePicker demo coverage
userStories.description: Add all Vant DatePicker demos: Date, Year-Month, Month-Day, Time, etc.
requirements: Include: Choose Date, Choose Year-Month, Choose Month-Day, Choose Time, Option Filter, Columns Order

userStories.title: Calendar demo coverage
userStories.description: Add all Vant Calendar demos: Single, Multiple, Range, Quick Select, etc.
requirements: Include: Select Single Date, Select Multiple Dates, Select Date Range, Quick Select, Show Confirm, Custom Day Text, Max Range

userStories.title: Form demo coverage
userStories.description: Add all Vant Form demos: Basic, Validation, Field Types, etc.
requirements: Include: Basic Usage, Validate Rules, Field Type (switch, checkbox, radio, stepper, rate, slider, uploader), Async Validation

userStories.title: Field demo coverage
userStories.description: Add all Vant Field demos: Basic, Custom Types, Disabled, Error, etc.
requirements: Include: Basic Usage, Custom Type (text/password/tel/number/textarea), Disabled/Readonly, Show Icon, Error Info, Insert Button, Auto Size

userStories.title: Tabs demo coverage
userStories.description: Add all Vant Tabs demos: Basic, Match by Name, Swipeable, Scrollable, etc.
requirements: Include: Basic Usage, Match by Name, Tab Bar Scroll, Swipe Tabs, Disabled Tab, Card Style, Click Event

userStories.title: List demo coverage
userStories.description: Add all Vant List demos: Basic, Error, Finished, etc.
requirements: Include: Basic Usage, Error Info, Finished Text, Pull to Refresh (if supported)

userStories.title: Swipe demo coverage
userStories.description: Add all Vant Swipe demos: Basic, Lazy Render, Indicator, Vertical, etc.
requirements: Include: Basic Usage, Lazy Render, Change Event, Vertical, Custom Size, Custom Indicator

userStories.title: ImagePreview demo coverage
userStories.description: Add all Vant ImagePreview demos: Basic, Start Position, Close Event, etc.
requirements: Include: Basic Usage, Set Start Position, Show Close Button, Before Close, Double Click Zoom

userStories.title: FloatingPanel/Bubble demo coverage
userStories.description: Add demos for FloatingPanel and FloatingBubble.
requirements: FloatingPanel: Basic Usage, Custom Anchors, Header Only Drag
FloatingBubble: Basic Usage, Magnetic Position, Custom Icon

userStories.title: Misc components demo coverage
userStories.description: Fill in missing demos for Circle, CountDown, CouponList, Skeleton, etc.
requirements: Audit pages with 0 or minimal demos
Add at least 3 demo sections per component
Focus on: circle, count-down, coupon-list, config-provider, contact-list, address-list
